RawCorrelationGroup.description:
A named group of correlated entities with an associated correlation matrix.

All entities in a group must share the same `entity_type` (same-type constraint, v0.4.0). Mixing entity types (e.g. inflow and load in the same group) produces a runtime validation error.

The `matrix` must be square, symmetric, have 1.0 on every diagonal, and have
all off-diagonal entries in [-1.0, 1.0]. The number of rows (and columns)
must equal the number of `entities`.

entities.description: Ordered list of entity references. The matrix row/column order matches this list. All entities must have the same `type` value; mixing entity types in one group produces a runtime validation error.

matrix.description:
Symmetric correlation matrix in row-major order.
- Must be square.
- Diagonal entries must be exactly 1.0.
- Off-diagonal entries must be in [-1.0, 1.0].
- Must be symmetric: |m[i][j] - m[j][i]| <= 1e-10.

RawEntity.description: Reference to a single entity within a correlation group.

id.description: Entity identifier matching the corresponding entity's `id` field.

type.description: Entity type tag. Valid values: `"inflow"` (hydro inflow series), `"load"` (bus load), `"ncs"` (non-controllable source availability).

RawProfile.description: A named correlation profile containing one or more correlation groups.

correlation_groups.description: Groups of correlated entities, each with a correlation matrix.

RawScheduleEntry.description: Maps a stage to the named correlation profile active for that stage.

profile_name.description: Name of the correlation profile for this stage. Must match a key in `profiles`.

stage_id.description: Stage index (0-based) this entry applies to.

description:
Spatial correlation model loaded from `scenarios/correlation.json`.

Defines named correlation profiles and an optional stage-to-profile schedule
for stochastic scenario generation. Each profile contains one or more
correlation groups, each grouping a set of entity inflow series with a
symmetric correlation matrix decomposed via the method specified in the
`method` field (default: `"spectral"`).

Profiles are stored in deterministic order (BTreeMap) regardless of JSON
declaration order. Schedule entries reference profile names that must exist
in the `profiles` map.

$schema.description: JSON schema URI — informational, not validated.

method.description: Decomposition method for the correlation matrix. Must not be empty. Defaults to `"spectral"`. `"cholesky"` is also accepted for backward compatibility with existing case files. Unrecognized values produce a warning but are not rejected.

profiles.description: Named correlation profiles. Must not be empty. Keys are profile names (e.g. `"default"`, `"wet_season"`).

schedule.description:
Optional stage-to-profile schedule. Absent or null = empty schedule (single profile applies everywhere).
Each entry's `profile_name` must match a key in `profiles`.

title: RawCorrelationFile
